desc: Three untold stories: Daisy's Kin, Blackfoot's Reckoning, and Spotfur's Rebellion.
descZh: 三个不为人知的故事：黛西的至亲、黑脚的审判、斑毛的反抗。

q.en: In Daisy's Kin, where did Daisy originally come from before joining ThunderClan?
q.zh: 在《黛西的至亲》中，黛西（Daisy）加入雷族前原本来自哪里？

options.en: The forest as a loner according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 树林里，一只泼皮猫（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Daisy came to ThunderClan from the horseplace, where she had lived as a barn cat.
explain.zh: 黛西原先是马场里的谷仓猫，后来才来到雷族。

q.en: In Daisy's Kin, what sad event makes Daisy feel lost in ThunderClan?
q.zh: 在《黛西的至亲》中，是什么伤心事让黛西在雷族里感到迷失？

options.en: She loses her rank as deputy

options.zh: 她的孩子们在战斗中死去

explain.en: Daisy grieves deeply after her kits are lost in battle during the troubled times of the Clans.
explain.zh: 在族群动荡的日子里，黛西的孩子们战死，她陷入了深深的悲痛。

q.en: In Daisy's Kin, Daisy must choose between her Clan and helping which cat?
q.zh: 在《黛西的至亲》中，黛西必须在族群和帮忙拯救哪只猫之间做选择？

options.en: Her former mate from the horseplace
A kittypet she has never met according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一只素未谋面的宠物猫（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: When her former mate from the horseplace needs help, Daisy must decide where her heart and loyalty truly belong.
explain.zh: 当马场时的旧伴侣需要帮助时，黛西必须想清楚自己的心与忠诚究竟属于哪里。

q.en: In Blackfoot's Reckoning, Blackfoot served as deputy to two treacherous leaders. Who were they?
q.zh: 在《黑脚的审判》中，黑脚（Blackfoot）曾给两位背信弃义的族长当副手，他们是谁？

options.en: Tallstar and Leopardstar according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 高星（Tallstar）和豹星（Leopardstar）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Blackfoot was deputy under Brokenstar and then Tigerstar, two of the forest's most ruthless leaders.
explain.zh: 黑脚先后给碎星和虎星当副手——那两位都是森林里最残忍的族长。

q.en: In Blackfoot's Reckoning, what name does Blackfoot take when he becomes leader of ShadowClan?
q.zh: 在《黑脚的审判》中，黑脚成为影族族长后改用了什么名字？

options.zh: 仍叫黑脚（Blackfoot），留在副族长位

explain.en: Once he earns the right to lead, Blackfoot receives his leader name: Blackstar.
explain.zh: 当他赢得领导族群的权利后，黑脚获得了族长名号：黑星。

q.en: In Blackfoot's Reckoning, to receive his nine lives, Blackfoot journeys to which sacred place?
q.zh: 在《黑脚的审判》中，为了接受九条命，黑脚前往了哪处圣地？

options.en: Fourtrees according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 四棵树（Fourtrees）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Like other leaders, Blackfoot travels to the Moonstone to be granted his nine lives by StarClan.
explain.zh: 和其他族长一样，黑脚前往月石，由星族授予他九条命。

q.en: In Blackfoot's Reckoning, how does StarClan treat Blackfoot when he seeks his nine lives?
q.zh: 在《黑脚的审判》中，当黑脚来求取九条命时，星族如何对待他？

options.en: They forgive him and grant his lives
options.zh: 他们原谅了他，并授予他九条命

options.en: They make him an elder according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们让他当长老（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Though his past is stained, StarClan forgives Blackfoot and grants him the nine lives of a leader.
explain.zh: 尽管过往沾满污点，星族还是原谅了黑脚，授予他作为族长的九条命。

q.en: In Spotfur's Rebellion, Spotfur is a warrior of which Clan?
q.zh: 在《斑毛的反抗》中，斑毛（Spotfur）是哪个族群的武士？

options.en: ShadowClan according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 影族（ShadowClan）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Spotfur is a young ThunderClan warrior who must decide whether to defy her own leader.
explain.zh: 斑毛是雷族年轻的武士，必须决定是否违抗自己的族长。

q.en: In Spotfur's Rebellion, what is wrong with Spotfur's Clan leader that makes her rebel?
q.zh: 在《斑毛的反抗》中，斑毛的族长出了什么问题，才让她奋起反抗？

options.en: The leader has left the Clan according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 族长离开了族群（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The leader has become a tyrant punishing cats without mercy
options.zh: 族长变成了暴君，毫不留情地惩罚猫

explain.en: Spotfur's leader rules as a tyrant, punishing cats cruelly, and she knows something is deeply wrong.
explain.zh: 斑毛的族长像个暴君一样残酷惩罚猫，她意识到事情出了大问题。

q.en: In Spotfur's Rebellion, Spotfur defies her leader for the good of whom?
q.zh: 在《斑毛的反抗》中，斑毛违抗族长，是为了谁的利益？

options.en: Only ThunderClan according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 只为了雷族（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Spotfur chooses to stand against her leader because it is the right thing for all five Clans.
explain.zh: 斑毛选择站出来反对族长，因为这对五个族群来说都是正确的事。
